column2: Verify Invalid Case Opening with Incorrect Documentation
column3: ["The CAA case officer accesses the applicant's OA pack. ", 'The CAA case officer reviews the OA pack and finds incorrect or outdated documentation. ', 'The CAA case officer attempts to open a valid case with the current OA pack. ', 'The applicant corrects all required documentation in the OA pack. ', 'The CAA case officer reviews the corrected OA pack again. ', 'The CAA case officer attempts to open a valid case with the updated OA pack. ']
column4: ["The CAA case officer is able to view and access the applicant's OA pack. ", 'The CAA case officer identifies that the provided documentation in the OA pack contains errors or is out of date. ', 'The system does not allow the CAA case officer to open a valid case due to incorrect or outdated documentation. ', 'All necessary documentation within the OA pack is now accurate and up-to-date. ', 'The CAA case officer confirms that all incorrect or outdated documentation has been corrected in the OA pack. ', 'The system now allows the CAA case officer to open a valid case as the required documentation is accurate and up-to-date. ']
